heading: Options
body:
| Option     | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Required? |
| ---------- | ------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| numBuckets | int    | Maximum number of facet categories to return in the results. Value must be less than or equal to 1000. If specified, MongoDB Search may return fewer categories than requested if the data is grouped into fewer categories than your requested number. If omitted, defaults to 10, which means that MongoDB Search will return only the top 10 facet categories by count. | no        |
| path       | string | Field path to facet on. You can specify a field that is indexed as a token.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | yes       |
| type       | string | Type of facet. Value must be string.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | yes       |
